title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Lament for Eridu (full)
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Lament for Eridu (full).
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Lament for Eridu (full).

translation.text: From 'Lament for Eridu (full)': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
